title: coffea occidentalis
intro: Coffea occidentalis, also known as the wild coffee or mountain coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Coffea occidentalis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coffea occidentalis include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
